title: ASR Outdoor 6pc Gold Panning Kit with 3OZ PAYDIRT Beginner Prospecting Equipment

ASR Outdoor 6pc Gold Panning Kit with 3OZ PAYDIRT Beginner Prospecting Equipment

Learn how to pan for gold with this six piece ASR Outdoor gold pan kit for beginners. This exciting new prospecting starter gold panning kit includes engineered gold paydirt by professional prospector Bobby Bo. With this kit, you'll be able to learn and practice gold panning techniques at home without having to travel to a claim site.

The ASR Outdoor six piece gold panning kit is an excellent option for kids and beginners who are just getting started in gold prospecting. Inside the kit, we’ve included six essential prospecting equipment tools to learn the basics of gold panning. You'll find a 10" dual riffle gold pan that will help you start identifying and collecting gold. There is a 3oz gold snuffer bottle that can be used to grab small gold flakes at the bottom of your gold pan, fill it with water to suck up your small gold pickers and use the included glass collection vials to safely store them.

Key Features

  • GOLD PAYDIRT: Each beginner gold pan kit comes with a 3 ounce bag of paydirt (total weight) and each bag contains fine gold flour and coarse gold flakes in the 20-30 mesh size range; Sealed in premium resealable bag
  • DUAL RIFFLE GOLD PAN: Best in class 10 inch gold pan has large and shallow riffle side wall, allowing better separation of gold from other material; lightweight, high contrast colors with carabiner hole
  • FINE GOLD RECOVERY TOOLS: x1 3oz capacity gold snuffer bottle designed to suction pick up gold flakes and gold flour; x1 small glass vials with screw cap, x1 loupe, x1 pair of tweezers
  • GOLD PANS: Gold pan should be seasoned before use by washing off all factory production oils
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Materials: plastic, metal, glass, paydirt; Color: blue; Glass vial capacity: 1 dram (.065oz), 1 2/3 dram (.1oz) air tight plastic lid; Dual Riffle Gold Pan size: 10” diameter; Snifter bottle capacity: 3oz; Pay dirt bag size: 3oz (.225lbs)

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 5PCKIDSGKBBLU
  • UPC: 810058484147
  • Color: Blue
  • Size: 6pc

We partnered with Bobby Bo to bring you this fun beginner gold pan gold panning kit for beginners, so you can watch online videos and follow along at home before heading out into the field. Bobby Bo gold paydirt is packed with size 20 and size 30 mesh coarse gold flake and fine gold flour with nearly no black sand or magnetite, so you will not have to do any classification work to find your gold in the included paydirt. This bag of paydirt gold was expertly designed to practice gold prospecting techniques, not to make you rich. Bobby Bo is a gold prospecting expert who specializes in teaching classes of all ages about gold panning and gold mining.

Grab this kit for yourself, a friend or family member who enjoys outdoor activities like camping and hiking. Its fun to find gold out it nature but learning how with the proper techniques is your first step in this fun outdoor hobby.

Good luck and we hope you have a lot of fun with this paydirt gold pan gold panning kit!
